pi_items.source: Verified by analyzing examples/twon_access_commander_env/scripts/seed_ac_data.py where 2N Access Commander users are synthetically defined and populated, and examples/twon_access_commander_env/tasks/correct_inverted_names/setup_task.sh which simulates the mapping error for these exact user profiles.

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses synthetically generated users hardcoded in Python setup scripts. For the task, the exact users intended to have their first and last names corrected are: 'Sandra Okafor' (s.okafor@buildingtech.com), 'Marcus Webb' (m.webb@buildingtech.com), and 'Mei-Ling Zhang' (m.zhang@buildingtech.com).
